mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message_outbox ( event_id, event_type, routing_key, exchange_name, biz_id, payload_json, status, retry_count, next_retry_time, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{eventId}, #{eventType}, #{routingKey}, #{exchangeName}, #{bizId}, #{payloadJson}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{nextRetryTime}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, event_id AS eventId, event_type AS eventType, routing_key AS routingKey, exchange_name AS exchangeName, biz_id AS bizId, payload_json AS payloadJson, status, retry_count AS retryCount, next_retry_time AS nextRetryTime, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM message_outbox WHERE event_id = #{eventId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE message_outbox SET status = 'SENT', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE message_outbox SET status = 'SENT', updated_at = NOW() -- 仅允许 NEW/FAIL -> SENT，避免重复覆盖已成功记录 WHERE status IN ('NEW', 'FAIL') AND id IN
#{id}
UPDATE message_outbox SET status = 'FAIL', retry_count = retry_count + 1, next_retry_time = #{nextRetryTime}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE message_outbox SET status = 'FAIL', retry_count = retry_count + 1, next_retry_time = #{nextRetryTime}, updated_at = NOW() -- 仅允许 NEW/FAIL 写回失败状态，保持状态机口径一致 WHERE status IN ('NEW', 'FAIL') AND id IN
#{id}
UPDATE message_outbox SET next_retry_time = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE event_id = #{eventId} AND status IN ('NEW', 'FAIL')
